gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/414)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/414)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ امْرَأَةً فَقَالَتْ أَنَا حُبْلَى وَ أَنَا أُخْتُكَ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ وَ أَنَا عَلَى غَيْرِ عِدَّةٍ قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ دَخَلَ بِهَا وَ وَاقَعَهَا فَلَا يُصَدِّقْهَا وَ إِنْ كَانَ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا وَ لَمْ يُوَاقِعْهَا فَلْيَخْتَبِرْ وَ لْيَسْأَلْ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ عَرَفَهَا قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married a woman, so she said, ‘I am pregnant, and I am your sister from the breast-feeding (from the same woman), and I am upon without a waiting period’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has copulated with her so he should not ratify her; but if it was such that he had not copulated with her, so let him inquire and ask around when he did not happen to know her before that’.
en.sarwar: 20. Ibn Mahbub has narrated from Hisham ibn Salim from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who marries a woman and who says that she is pregnant and that she is his sister because of breastfeeding and that she has not completed her waiting period. He (the Imam) said, ’If he has gone to bed (engaged in sexual intercourse) with her, he must not accept her words but if he has not done so, he must investigate if he did not know before.’”
